title: THE TWIDDLERS Teddy Bear with I Love You Heart, 25cm / 10" - Cute White Plush Toy for Her and Him, Birthday Gift for Girlfriend Boyfriend, Anniversary, Valentine's Day
features: ❤️Perfect for Someone Special: Let this 25cm teddy bear be your messenger of love. It's a charming way to say "I love you" every day!

❤️Soft Huggable Cuddly Bear: Embrace the warmth of love with our 10" teddy bear! Perfect for Valentine's Day, as a cute girlfriend gift, birthdays, or just because - great as I love you gifts for her.
❤️Premium Quality: Crafted with care and soft plush material, our cute teddy bear valentines is designed for cuddles and lasting memories - the perfect 'i love you teddy'.
❤️Unforgettable Gift: Make hearts melt with this adorable white teddy bear, an ideal romantic gesture for him or her. Show your affection with this valentines day teddy bear.
❤️Satisfaction Guaranteed: We offer an 100% warranty on all of our small teddies, please contact us if you have any issues with our valentines gifts for her teddy and we will be happy to help.
